characters.name: Aunty
characters.description: Aunty Auntyis a character who was first seen in "Snailboy". She is the upper bodless mother ofSnailboy, the wife ofUncle Snail,Mom's older sister,Dad's sister-in-law and the maternal aunt ofCowandChicken. She is only ever seen from the waist down, implying that she may have no upper body, much like Mom. Unlike Mom, she is not insane and is far less eccentric, with a genuine love for her husband and son. She was voiced byEdie McClurg.

characters.name: Big Foot
characters.description: Big Foot Big Footis a weirdo living in the woods who has an incredibly large right foot. He often steals food from local campers.

characters.name: Black Sheep
characters.description: Black Sheep Black Sheepis a character from theCartoon Networkoriginal seriesCow and Chicken. He only appears in the episode "Black Sheep of the Family". He is voiced byTom Kenny. Black Sheep is Cow and Chicken's cousin and the black sheep of the family. Like Boneless Chicken and Cousin Sow, it is unknown which side of the family he is related to. Although he is actually nice, people often accuse him of being a criminal and in the episode "Black Sheep of the Family" he is apprehended by Officer O'Fannahey (the Red Guy). However he was rescued by Super Cow and everyone changed their minds about him after he saved a woman's life from a heart attack.

characters.name: Blind Mud Puddle Johnson
characters.description: Blind Mud Puddle Johnson Blind Mud Puddle Johnsonis one ofCowandChicken's neighbors and a renowned Blues singer in the bayou who can use the lyrics in his Blues songs to make things happen to others. He appeared in the episodeThe Cow and Chicken Blueswhere Cow and Chicken visited him in hopes that he could cure their blues. Later they discovered that he had been replaced by theRed Guy, who had imprisoned Johnson in his own home. After Cow and Chicken freed Johnson, he sang a song about the Red Guy getting eaten by a large alligator.

After Cow and Chicken freed Johnson, he sang a song about the Red Guy getting eaten by a large alligator.

characters.name: Boneless Chicken
characters.description: Boneless Chickenis one ofCowandChicken's cousins. He has no bones, hence his name. Boneless Chicken is the older cousin of Cow and Chicken, he’s is a white leghorn as he is often called upon to babysit them and lives in his own bachelor pad, heavily implying that he's an adult. He is an active dater and performs as a "stand-up" comedian. He has no bones, so he only takes a shower in the laundry machine. Cousin Boneless is very dramatic, as well as sarcastic he is also shown to be witty and funny. But people often mistake his rants for a joke and congratulate him. He also has a military background, having served in his army's kite division during the Vietnam War.

characters.name: Boneless Grandma
characters.description: Boneless Grandmais an old cow mentioned in "Cow and Chicken Reclining" and "Alive!". She is the mother ofDadandProfessor Longhorn Steer, the wife ofGrandpaand the paternal grandmother ofCowandChicken. Judging from her name, she had no bones in her body, a trait which was apparently inherited byBoneless Chicken. When Dad was young, she gave him the family clock which had been passed down to every calf in their family for generations.

characters.name: Bully from Scottsdale
characters.description: TheBully from Scarsdaleis a character appearing in the episodesSchool Bullyas the main antagonist andSumo Cowas a minor antagonist. He is really just a very small person in a inflatable suit. He acts very intimidating and claims to know more about bullying thanButchdoes and even states that he rips the molars out of anyone's mouth. He also takes pleasure in hurting people and even insulting (Though he’s been shown to be better at insulting than bullying). characters.name: Cerberus
characters.description: Cerberusis the secondary antagonist of theCow and Chickenpilot episodeNo Smoking. Cerberus is a three-headed dog with a collar for each head. Only one head retains the blue color from his body, the other two heads appear to be each different colors. Cerberus is an accomplice to theDevil's plans of capturing Cow and Chicken, but he also holds back the Devil by reminding his superior the rules he must follow.

characters.name: Chachi
characters.description: Chachi Chachiis the titular character of the episode "Chachi the Chewing Gum Seal". He is a seal thatCowmade out of chewing gum. Chachi is brought to life after Cow makes a wish on a wishing star, but turns out to be unhappy and unconfident. When Cow brings Chachi to watch TV, Chicken chews on Chachi and pops him. Cow then teaches Chachi to stand up for himself, and when Chicken chews on Chachi again, Chachi chases him and beats Chicken to a pulp. Cow congratulates Chachi, but Chachi is ungrateful for this and proceeds to berate and yell at Cow, causing her to cry. She sticks him under the table, where he is stuck and falling apart a month later.

characters.name: Chachi

She sticks him under the table, where he is stuck and falling apart a month later.

characters.name: Chicken
characters.description: "(insert random thing) “Is this cartoon ever gonna make sense!”  Chicken is one of the two main characters inCow and Chicken, and is the most sane character of the show. He is voiced byCharlie Adler. Cow's11 year old brother, Chicken is often a grumpy and/or mean to his younger sister, and even to the rest of the family, particularly Dream Date Chicken and Chicken in the Bathroom, but he's otherwise laid-back most of the time. He goes to 5th grade in his school along with his best friendsFlemandEarl. Chicken is notably much more intelligent and sane than the other characters in the show, and has a powerful ego, though his selfish actions can actually come to others' help. An example of all these can be found in the episode "Comet!", where Chicken was the only one who walked normally (the other characters followed the Red Guy by using their buttocks instead of their legs), and later Chicken tricked all the others in belief that a deadly comet was coming to smash them all and sold "Shields" (rather cheap gadgets) to them, but after he witnessed Cow's farewell to her toys, Chicken felt guilty and confessed the scam. However, when a real deadly (but small) comet arrived, Chicken's protections actually worked and he was forgiven for his prank. Despite his powerful ego, he also has a strong conscience, usually only displayed when Cow is in danger. He has a Boston-Brooklyn hybrid accent, which is why his speech is riddled with malapropisms and sarcasm. Despite being a male, he demonstrated the ability to lay eggs. Like other chickens, he cannot fly, though he is afraid of flying on planes, as evident inChickens Don't Fly. Chicken is also the only character in the show who knows that his sister and Supercow are the same person and, despite his name, is a young anthropomorphic Hybrid white leghorn and Cornish rooster. Like Cow, Chicken has also an alter ego, namedWonder Wattle; on his first appearance inWho Is Supercow?, Chicken needed to learn Spanish quick using his dictionary while saving Supercow. His second appearance onCow's Magic Blankethas Wonder Wattle speaking Spanish a lot more correctly while saving his sister along with his best friends Flem and Earl. Chicken is also very fond of ice skating, as seen inA Couple of Skating Fools. Many people compare Chicken to Ren fromThe Ren and Stimpy Show, since both of them are grumpy.

characters.name: Crabs the Warthog
characters.description: Crabs the Warthog Crabs the Warthogis one ofCow's dolls alongsideManure the BearandPiles the Beaver, and it is her most cherished toy. Like his fellow dolls, he is actually alive but only moves when Cow is not around. Crabs is a happy-go-lucky individual with unending hopeless who never gets angry.

characters.name: Dad
characters.description: Timm Mehrens (Denmark Dub)Darcy Pedrosa (Brazilian Portuguese Dub, Seasons 1-3)Domínio Costa (Brazilian Portuguese Dub, Season 4) Dad, (voiced by Dee Bradley Baker), isCowandChicken's upper bodiless father. He is also the brother ofProfessor Longhorn Steerand the son ofGrandpa. On screen, only his legs and waist are shown. He is identified by green pants and brown loafers. He boasts his manliness, stating that even the most mundane of tasks (such as driving in the snow) "bring out the man in him". Dad does not seem to know about Cow's birth and once stated she was born in a cabbage and claimed, "That was the best cabbage we ever had". Like his wife, he isinsaneand bumbling. Though, considering how Cow is 7, he likely lied, seeing that she was too young to know about the birds and the bees. For example, he once woke up his kids at 3:00 a.m. only to tell them how he andMommet. It is implied on multiple occasions that he was once a cowardly boy, such as in "Who's Afraid of the Dark?" when he told Mom, "This is the best idea I've had since becoming a man!" and giving CowBoneless Grandma's clock that was passed down to all the girls/calves in his family, that his mother had given to him.

characters.name: Dick
characters.description: Dickis the school bully andChicken's regular tormentor. Despite his mean and crude behavior on weekdays, he's actually a nice guy on weekends and does his part to help the poor and the sick.
